results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Sets your whole day' is soft and vague — no specific payoff or contrarian angle to stop a scroll.
rationales.clarity: Each slide holds one idea and the action (ten minutes outside) is concrete and actionable this week.
rationales.audience_fit: Tired-by-3pm crowd will recognize the sleep-mood-energy chain, and the low-effort ask (coffee outside) fits a busy schedule.
rationales.novelty: Morning light for circadian rhythm is extremely well-worn territory with no fresh angle or surprising data point.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged ('can help', 'often mean'), voice is plain and calm, CTA ties naturally to the Health Score.
rationales.predicted_performance: Solid save bait for wellness audiences but the generic topic limits organic reach and share potential.
